---
name: Proposal
about: Propose a concrete change to ARS-1
title: "[PROPOSAL] "
labels: proposal, v0.2
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the proposed change.

## Section affected

(e.g. §3.2 Class I attributes, §8 Purpose codes, §10 AIS-1/AAS-1 binding, schemas/ars-1-class-i.schema.json)

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is the current spec inadequate? What gap or ambiguity does this address?

## Proposed change

Concrete text or schema change. If a textual change, please include before/after. If a schema change, please include the affected fields and how they should be modified.

### Before

```
(current text or schema fragment)
```

### After

```
(proposed text or schema fragment)
```

## Compatibility impact

Does this break v0.2 implementations? Is migration needed? Does it require coordinating with AIS-1 / AAS-1 changes?

## Open questions

Anything you've considered but not resolved.

---

*Proposals are reviewed by the ARS-1 team and may be incorporated into v0.3 or held for a later version. Substantive proposals will receive a written response.*
